commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh In the year that Tartan came unto Ashdod (when Sargon the king of Assyria sent him,) and fought against Ashdod, and took it; Year. Eighteen after the preceding predictions. (Calmet) Sargon. Sennacherib, (St. Jerome) Salmanasar, (Sanctius) or Assar don, who intended to revenge Sennacherib, and sent his "collector of taxes "to take Azotus from Ezechias, and then to proceed farther. (Calmet) Psammitichus having obtained the sole dominion of Egypt, besieged Azotus for 29 years. (Herodotus ii.
